title: S'mores Ooey Gooey Bars
ingredients: 18 whole graham crackers, or two cellophane wrapped stacks
2/3 bag of large marshmallows, cut in half
instructions: In a food processor, process graham crackers until finely ground.
Stir in melted butter and salt.
Press the graham cracker mixture into a 13×9″ pan.
Bake for 5 minutes and remove from oven.
Sprinkle chocolate chips over the graham cracker crust.
Drizzle the can of condensed milk over the chocolate chips.
Bake for 20 minutes more, until marshmallows are lightly browned.
notes: To brown marshmallows to "perfect" brown, place under broiler for a few seconds.
Super easy recipe, great for church summer events.
